intro: Klaxons scream across the plant floor. The core is going critical - and the only way to the shutdown is blocked. Three of your Pokemon stand ready; there is time to send in just ONE.
title: Reactor Meltdown
description: The reactor is moments from blowing. {{job}} The three on hand are a close match for the job - send in the one truly cut out for it. Right, and the bled-off charge hardens into a Capacitor relic. Wrong, and the blowout torches your whole team.
stabilized: It pulls the job off! The core sighs back to safe levels, and the bled-off charge hardens into a Capacitor.
blowout: Not enough - it can't finish the job in time. The core lurches and a wave of fire washes over your whole team before the failsafes catch it.
